name: Metro Med Svc
districts_or_customers: PA Medical Assistance Transportation Program (MATP) region
recent_news: Operates as a division of Silver Spring Ambulance at 102 Market St, New Cumberland, PA; serves Cumberland/Dauphin county NEMT clientele. No school transportation footprint identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator and not independent — it is a division of Silver Spring Ambulance providing NEMT/ambulette only. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: All Pro Limo
recent_news: Founded/operated by former Atlanta Falcons special-teams player Elbert Shelley as All-Pro Limousine after his NFL retirement (1990s). Listed at PO Box 11770, Alpharetta, GA; appears to remain a small livery operation with no school district contracts.
fit_notes: Wrong vertical — limousine/livery service, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Tiny scale (5 employees, ~$418K). Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Gmtcare LLC
districts_or_customers: Medicaid/MCO NEMT contracts across NV, AZ, NM
recent_news: GMTCare is Nevada's largest non-emergency medical transportation company, founded 2009, HQ Las Vegas with additional locations in Reno, Phoenix, and Santa Fe; ZoomInfo lists ~$18.7M revenue and ~59 employees (far above the 6/$418K shown in source data).
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/ambulance services platform across NV/AZ/NM — not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Out of Summit's vertical; not a tuck-in target.

name: Sessaly Rose Transit Inc
recent_news: Sessaly Rose Transit is a small shuttle/airport-transport operator at 1839 S Monroe St, Tallahassee; DOT-registered (USDOT 1284671); no evidence of Leon County school district contract or SPED routes.
fit_notes: Wrong vertical — shuttle/airport transit, not a school-bus contractor. Sub-scale (6 employees, ~$399K). Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Hope Ambulette Svc Corp
recent_news: Hope Ambulette Service Corp, established 1994 at 1563 Boone Ave, Bronx; led by long-tenured president Jose H. Santana; ~21 staff per Manta; NPI #1124243316 lists it as non-emergency medical transport van.
fit_notes: NYC Medicaid ambulette operator — not a yellow-bus / school-district SPED contractor. Long-tenured founder (32+ yrs) suggests succession dynamic but vertical is NEMT not student transport. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
